component.name: CheckItem
component.script:
sub init() m.label = m.top.findNode("itemLabel") m.top.observeFieldScoped("itemContent", "onItemContentChange") end sub
sub onItemContentChange(event as object) itemContent = event.getData() if itemContent <> invalid m.label.text = itemContent.title ' Measure the label and publish the derived width for the owner to read back. m.top.calculatedWidth = m.label.boundingRect().width + 32 end if end sub
